Sehyog – Ek Koshish

A volunteer-driven social initiative working since 2018 to help people in need through food distribution, education support, medical help, and social services in Thanesar & Kurukshetra.

About Us
Ek Koshish
Since 2018

Sehyog – Ek Koshish is a social initiative working since 2018 to help people in need through food distribution, education support, medical help, and social services.

Based in Thanesar, Kurukshetra — we are a community of passionate volunteers who believe every small effort creates a massive change. Our work is powered entirely by people who care.

🗓️ Serving Since 2018 · Thanesar, Kurukshetra
What We Do
Our Services
🍱
Food & Daily Support
●Sehyog Ki Rasoi — hot meals every Sunday, running for 2 years
●Milk service every Wednesday at Civil Hospital
●Weekly milk service at Brahma Sarovar
●Water cooler & Shabeel service in summers
●Mango shake service for needy children
📚
Education Support
●Books, notebooks & bags provided to 110 children
●School fees support for 40 children
●Ongoing education support services for underprivileged students
🏥
Medical Support
●95 medical support cases handled for needy patients
●Wheelchair service provided to patients in need
●7 Blood Donation Camps organised
🧵
Aatmanirbhar Project (Self-Reliance)
●Two सिलाई training centres established for women's self-reliance
❄️
Seasonal Drives
●Winter distribution — blankets, socks, caps & cardigans
●Diwali gift drive for 101 children
●Sweets distribution in slum areas on festivals
🐄
Animal Welfare
●Gau Mata Chara Seva — regular fodder distribution
●Regular dogs feeding drive for stray animals
💍
Special Services
●28 Vivaah Seva — supporting marriages of underprivileged families
Our Mission
Why We Do This

"हर कोशिश एक उम्मीद है — हर मदद एक नई जिंदगी की शुरुआत।"
